message:
refactor(observability): extract format_summary_output with configurable stuck-task highlighting

Splits the monolithic render_summary() into a pure
format_summary_output() that accepts a highlight_stuck_tasks bool,
making the stuck-tasks section suppressible for machine-consumed
or compact output paths.  render_summary() delegates to the new
function with highlight_stuck_tasks=true to preserve existing
behavior.  format_summary_for_export() uses
highlight_stuck_tasks=false.

Test: format_summary_output_hides_stuck_section_when_highlight_disabled
verifies that a summary with stuck_count > 0 omits the stuck block
when highlighting is off.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
